name: Standard user successful login with valid credentials
preconditions: The SauceDemo application is accessible at the base URL
The user 'standard_user' account exists and is active
The browser is open and no user is currently logged in
Cookies and local storage are cleared from any previous session

steps.action: Navigate to the application base URL
steps.expected: The Login Page is displayed with a username field, password field, and a Login button visible

steps.action: Enter the username into the Username input field
steps.expected: The text 'standard_user' appears in the username input field with no error styling

steps.action: Enter the password into the Password input field
steps.expected: The password field shows masked characters (dots or asterisks) and no error styling is present
The browser navigates away from the Login Page and the URL changes to '/inventory.html'
The URL in the browser address bar ends with '/inventory.html'

steps.action: Verify the page header title text
steps.expected: The page header displays the text 'Products'

steps.action: Verify the product inventory list is displayed
steps.expected: At least one product item with a name, image, description, and price is visible on the page

steps.action: Verify the navigation menu button is present
steps.expected: The hamburger/menu icon is visible in the top-left corner of the page, indicating a successful authenticated session

postconditions: The user 'standard_user' is logged in and the session is active on the Products Page
The application state reflects an authenticated user with no items in the cart
